parents.subject: LU-18231 obd: change obd_starting into OBDF_STARTING

commit.subject: LU-18231 obd: change obd_force into OBDF_FORCE
commit.message:
LU-18231 obd: change obd_force into OBDF_FORCE

Change the use of the obd_force bitfield into a bit in
the obd_flags bitmap and use atomic bit set/clear/test
operations on it.
No logical changes to the code and no changes to locking.

Test-Parameters: trivial
